offer_positioning: AI-powered outbound email quality control for revenue teams — generate, remix, and enforce messaging standards at scale.
differentiators: Deterministic compliance engine blocks policy violations before send
Preset library with 6 angle-based strategies per account
Zero hallucination: all facts grounded in research you provide
constraints: Do not imply EmailDJ generates content without human review
Do not claim reply rate guarantees
cta_offer_lock: Open to a 15-min walkthrough to see if this fits your outbound motion?
company_notes: EmailDJ helps revenue teams control outbound quality at scale. Reps generate first drafts; the compliance engine enforces messaging standards before anything reaches a prospect.
